---
title: ""
output: html_document
date: ''
---

<style type="text/css">
.title {
  display: none;
}

getting-started img {
  margin-right: 10px;
}
img {
  align:left;
  margin-bottom: 50px;
}
}

</style>

<!-- https://www.quora.com/How-do-I-add-space-between-images-in-HTML --> 
<div style="width: 40%; float:left">
<div>
<img src="/Users/hubenxia/Documents/algorithm/BenxiaHu.github.io/picture/BenxiaHu.jpg" width=300 height=300"/>
</div>
<!-- <img align="left" src="/Users/hubenxia/Documents/algorithm/BenxiaHu.github.io/picture/BenxiaHu.jpg" width=300 height=300 style="margin-bottom: 50px;"/>--> 
</div>
<div style="width: 60%; float:right">
<font size=5>My name is **Benxia Hu**. I obtained my Ph.D. from the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences (UCAS), and Kunming Institute of Zoology, Chinese Academy of Sciences (KIZ,CAS) in 06/2018. I did my postdoctoral training in UNC-CH and UTH.</font>  
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>My background is wet lab and dry lab.</font>  
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>My interest includes 3D genome architectures of human brain, Alzheimer's disease, Deep Learning and Linear Algebra.</font>  
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>I would like to address biological questions of interest via Computational biology and functional experiments.</font>  
<br>
<br>
</div>
